name: PatientMobilePhoneProvider
title: Mobile Phone Provider
description:
This value set includes various mobile phone providers configured in aria. 
The list of configured mobile phone providers are available under ValueSet 'aria-mobilephoneprovider'. 
All values can be accessed using  $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/patient-mobilephoneprovider
